Psychic Duelist.description: Through experience and in-depth visualizations of mental battles, you've grown adept at psychic duels. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your initiative rolls for psychic duels.

Rivethun Emissary.name: Rivethun Emissary

Rivethun Invoker.description: PFS Note Rivethun is a philosophy which characters may choose as their religion. Doing so fulfills the “follower of Rivethun” access condition.

Sleepwalker.name: Sleepwalker
Sleepwalker.description: You've learned to manipulate states of consciousness, beginning with your own. You can send yourself into a half-awake, daydreaming state and gain the Daydream Trance action.

Starlit Sentinel.name: Starlit Sentinel
Starlit Sentinel.description: You’ve been chosen by one of the constellations of the Tian Xia zodiac. You gain a transformation seal: a mundane-seeming item of light Bulk, such as a ring, brooch, or key,

Starstone Aspirant.name: Starstone Aspirant
Starstone Aspirant.description: Divine glory awaits! You embrace your longing to make a true and lasting difference in the Universe by embarking on the path to apotheosis. You dedicate yourself to this journey,

Steel Falcon.name: Steel Falcon
Steel Falcon.description: Access You're invited by a current member of the Eagle Knights or the People's Council. You serve as an envoy of the ideals of Andoran, whether it's in a foreign court or on the field

Sterling Dynamo.name: Sterling Dynamo
Sterling Dynamo.description: You obtain a sterling dynamo prosthetic, which allows you to replace or augment a limb, or even add a simple new non-prehensile limb, such as a tail. While your sterling dynamo

Stone Brawler.name: Stone Brawler
Stone Brawler.source: Pathfinder #195: Heavy is the Crown pg. 82
Stone Brawler.description: You've learned to call the primal power of elemental stone to your aid. You gain the Stonestrike Stance action.

Stonebound.name: Stonebound
Stonebound.source: Pathfinder #195: Heavy is the Crown pg. 83
Stonebound.description: You bind yourself to the very essence of stone. You become trained in Plane of Earth Lore and learn the Terran language. If you are already trained in Plane of Earth Lore, you

Student Of Perfection.name: Student Of Perfection
Student Of Perfection.prerequisites: powerful fist, or expert in unarmed attacks; member of a House of Perfection
Student Of Perfection.description: Access You are from Jalmeray. You have learned the martial arts techniques of your House of Perfection. You become

Swordmaster.name: Swordmaster
Swordmaster.prerequisites: Strength 14, Dexterity 14, or Constitution 14; member of the Pathfinder
Swordmaster.description: Society affiliated with the School of Swords Access A character who is a member of the Pathfinder Society has access to this option.

Talisman Dabbler.name: Talisman Dabbler
Talisman Dabbler.description: You are trained in the use of talismans and similar magical paraphernalia. This training might have occurred in a formal classroom or been an accumulation of folk magic picked up

Alchemist.name: Alchemist
Alchemist.prerequisites: Intelligence 14 or access to Alchemist class features
Alchemist.description: You gain the basic abilities of the Alchemist class through multiclass dedication.

Thaumaturge.description: You gain the basic abilities of the Thaumaturge class through multiclass dedication.

Witch.name: Witch
Witch.prerequisites: Intelligence 14 or access to Witch class features

Wizard.name: Wizard
Wizard.prerequisites: Intelligence 14 or access to Wizard class features
Wizard.description: You gain the basic abilities of the Wizard class through multiclass dedication.

Acrobat.name: Acrobat
Acrobat.description: You have trained your body to perform incredible, seemingly superhuman feats of grace and agility. You become an expert in Acrobatics.

Bright Lion.name: Bright Lion
Bright Lion.source: Pathfinder #172: Secrets of the Temple City pg. 79
Bright Lion.description: You have joined the Bright Lions, a group of freedom fighters working to end slavery in Cheliax and beyond.

Tattooed Historian.name: Tattooed Historian
Tattooed Historian.prerequisites: Constitution +1; trained in Orc Lore, Belkzen Lore, or Orc Pantheon Lore
Tattooed Historian.description: You bear tattoos that tell the stories of Belkzen's history. You gain access to uncommon magical tattoos with the orc trait.

Thlipit Contestant.name: Thlipit Contestant
Thlipit Contestant.prerequisites: You have a long prehensile tongue or a tail
Thlipit Contestant.description: You practice thlipit, a tripkee martial art combining whip fighting with wrestling. Your tongue or tail becomes a formidable weapon.

Time Mage.name: Time Mage
Time Mage.description: You have learned to manipulate time itself, slowing enemies and hastening allies through magical mastery.

Viking.name: Viking
Viking.description: You sail the seas, raid coastal settlements, and fight with the ferocity of a seasoned raider. You gain Shield Block and Sudden Charge.

Wrestler.name: Wrestler
Wrestler.description: You have trained extensively in the art of unarmed grappling. You gain improved versions of Athletics maneuvers.

Zombie.name: Zombie
Zombie.prerequisites: you died and were raised as a zombie
Zombie.description: You have died and been raised as a zombie, retaining your consciousness while gaining the powers and limitations of undeath.

Vampire.name: Vampire
Vampire.prerequisites: you died and were raised as a vampire
Vampire.description: You have been turned into a vampire, gaining immortality and supernatural power at the cost of sunlight and a need for blood.

Werecreature.name: Werecreature
Werecreature.description: A lycanthropic curse runs through your veins, granting you the ability to transform into a powerful hybrid beast form.

Trapsmith.name: Trapsmith
Trapsmith.description: You are a master of crafting and setting traps to ensnare your foes. You gain the Snare Crafting feat and can set traps quickly.
